name: chr20_20p11_21_CDC25B_SD
description: 20p11.21 SD field containing CDC25B (cell cycle phosphatase), AP5S1 and CST3 paralogs. The region sits within the broader 20p pericentric SD enrichment and contributes to occasional 20p11.21 recurrent CNVs flanked by ~50-100 kb SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~50-100 kb direct SD blocks at ~96-98% identity flanking CDC25B, GZF1, NAPB; embedded in the 20p pericentric SD-enriched belt.
